summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Labels CRUD, Import mode selection (replace/append), Login page icon, and Labels display in client menu. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/labels - returns list of labels
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/labels - creates new label with name and color
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/labels/{lid} - updates label name and color
Backend: DELETE /api/restaurants/{id}/labels/{lid} - deletes label
Backend: DELETE label also removes label_id from all menu_items (tested via $pull operation)
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items with label_ids - saves label assignments
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items/{iid} with label_ids - updates label assignments
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-menu with mode=append - adds to existing menu
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-menu with mode=replace - deletes all existing and imports new
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file?mode=replace - file upload with replace mode
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file?mode=append - file upload with append mode
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{code} - returns labels array in response
Frontend: Login page shows UtensilsCrossed icon (fork & knife, not Leaf)
Frontend: Labels button (Ярлыки) visible in Menu page header
Frontend: Label dialog shows existing labels with colors, edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Label dialog has name input, color picker with presets, preview badge
Frontend: Import file triggers mode selection dialog
Frontend: Import mode dialog shows 'Полное обновление' (replace) and 'Дополнить меню' (append) options
Frontend: Item edit dialog shows custom labels section with toggle buttons
Frontend: Selected labels shown with solid color background, unselected with dashed border
Frontend: Client menu displays custom labels as colored badges on items
seed_data_creation: Test data with TEST_ prefix was created and cleaned up during testing. Existing labels (Хит, Сезонное, Выбор гостей) remain in restaurant aa25189d-d668-4838-915a-c5d936547f3f.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features are fully implemented and working: 1) Import mode selection (replace/append) via query param mode or body field, 2) Login page uses UtensilsCrossed icon from lucide-react, 3) Labels CRUD with full UI for creation, editing, deletion, color picker, and assignment to menu items. Labels display in client menu as colored badges. The 3 default labels exist: Хит (#ef4444), Сезонное (#f97316), Выбор гостей (#8b5cf6).

login_page_icon.visual: Fork and knife crossed in teal/mint circle

labels_on_menu_items.backend: label_ids array in MenuItem model, stored and returned
labels_on_menu_items.frontend_admin: Label selector in item edit dialog with toggle buttons
labels_on_menu_items.frontend_client: Labels displayed as colored Badge components
